arts.ttl: What Mathys Tel texted Harry Kane after Tottenham transfer as request made
arts.sum: Harry Kane has revealed a text message exchange with Mathys Tel after the Frenchman completed a transfer to Tottenham on deadline day. And former Spurs captain Kane, who played with Tel at Bayern Munich, has shared that both players have been sending messages since the young forward's move to the club was confirmed on Monday.
